strict_leave_one_city_out.definition: Primary city-level leave-one-city-out validation: each of the four cities appears exactly once as target.

calibration_vs_no_calibration.definition: calibration_strength shrinks simulator residual by strength; 0 means uncalibrated, 0.2 means 20% residual removal before H2O+ correction

source_similarity_weighting.definition: City-balanced source sufficient statistics reweighted by static speed/headway/route/demand similarity to the target city.

source_weighting_sensitivity.definition: Grid sensitivity for source-city similarity weighting temperature and floor.

source_subset_robustness.definition: Checks whether cross-city conclusions hold after removing major data-source families.

subsets.name: all_four_strict_leave_one_out
subsets.definition: All available cities; each city is target once.

subsets.name: exclude_singapore_gtfs_traffic_only
subsets.definition: Singapore removed; remaining cities all use GTFS schedule-derived traffic.

subsets.name: exclude_austin_schedule_demand_proxy
subsets.definition: Austin removed; remaining cities have observed or apportioned passenger demand sources.

subsets.name: north_american_observed_ridership_pair
subsets.definition: Two North American systems with observed/apportioned ridership; one city is source and one is target.

generator_robustness.definition: Strict leave-one-city-out evaluation under output-group target perturbations and expected measurement noise.

sampled_rollout.note: Generated four-city bundles do not include SUMO .sumocfg files; this uses H2O BusSimEnv live event rollout as the executable rollout substitute.
